commands.review_summary:
This PR adds a payload-builder fallback that marks `message_tool_only` final assistant text for source delivery when no message-tool delivery proof exists, plus two payload regression tests.

PR surface: Source +13, Tests +45. Total +58 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level. Current docs, tests, and the checked-in QA scenario show `message_tool_only` final text with no message-tool send is kept private and warned rather than delivered; I did not run a live Telegram proof in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] A maintainer needs to choose the `message_tool_only` recovery policy and privacy boundary before this branch can be repaired safely, and the contributor still needs real behavior proof.

target.title: fix: deliver message-tool-only final reports without proof
target.body:
## Summary
- fall back to native source delivery when `message_tool_only` final assistant text was not actually delivered by the message tool
- keep message-tool-delivered replies private when delivery proof exists
- add regression coverage for missing and unproved message-tool delivery

## What Problem This Solves
A long final report can be written into the session transcript while Telegram receives nothing if the run is in `message_tool_only` mode and no delivery proof exists. The completion/report path treated the requested delivery mode or attempted message-tool path as enough, even when no actual message-tool delivery proof existed.

This keeps the lean native OpenClaw path: when delivery proof is absent, the existing source-delivery path is allowed to deliver the final assistant text instead of adding a new queue, wrapper, or monitor.

## Evidence
- Local regression test on current `origin/main`-based PR branch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/payloads.test.ts` passed 1 file / 38 tests.
- Formatting check: `npx oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/payloads.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/payloads.test.ts` passed.
- Production symptom prompting the fix: final report text existed in the session transcript, but the Telegram-visible delivery mirror was absent for the long final report while a later short status message did have delivery proof.

## Test
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/payloads.test.ts`
- `npx oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/payloads.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/payloads.test.ts`
